name: 24"x36" Textured Wall Mirror White - Threshold™
description:
Stylish and functional, this Textured Wall Mirror from Threshold™ makes an elegant addition to your home decor. This wall mirror features a textured wooden frame in white, making it simple to integrate into any decor scheme. Easy to mount on a wall, this rectangular mirror is perfect for your entryway, living room, bathroom, or bedroom, allowing you to check your appearance before heading out.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
